title: Reverse Marketplace PRD Review
summary: Granola meeting transcript reviewing the PRD readiness checklist and debating fee structure (local free vs. service fee) ahead of DFW launch.
notes: Meeting transcript (Granola export) — prose-only monologue with no frontmatter, no user stories, acceptance criteria, decisions/consequences, or schemas. Reviews/debates an external PRD rather than defining requirements itself; classified as DOC for context.
